title: bupleurum quinquedentatum
intro: Bupleurum quinquedentatum, also known as Chinese thunder of heaven, is a type of flowering plant in the genus Bupleurum, belonging to the family Apiaceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum quinquedentatum include reducing fever, relieving stress and anxiety, and boosting the immune system. Bupleurum quinquedentatum is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to promote overall well-being.
